content:
I’m excited to share that I’ve been selected as a Legal Intern at Hamari Pahchan - NGO.

I’m grateful for this opportunity to learn, contribute, and gain practical exposure in the legal field while working towards creating a positive social impact. 
Looking forward to developing my legal skills, understanding grassroots issues, and making the most of this internship experience.

Thank you to the team at Hamari Pahchan - NGO for this opportunity.

comment: NGO legal work often reveals the gap between written law and lived realities; learning to balance legal principles with community needs will shape stronger advocates.
